sql_reader_query.value: @concat('SELECT batch_id, status, record_count, threshold_value FROM dbo.batch_metadata WHERE batch_id = ''', pipeline().parameters.batch_id, ''' AND environment = ''', pipeline().parameters.env, '''')

@concat('SELECT item_name, item_value, item_category, is_active, priority_score FROM dbo.items WHERE item_name = ''', item(), ''' AND batch_id = ''', pipeline().parameters.batch_id, ''' AND env = ''', pipeline().parameters.env, '''')

@concat('SELECT COUNT(*) AS row_count, MIN(id) AS min_id, MAX(id) AS max_id FROM ', pipeline().parameters.source_table, ' WHERE batch_id = ''', pipeline().parameters.batch_id, ''' AND env = ''', pipeline().parameters.env, '''')
@concat('SELECT * FROM ', pipeline().parameters.source_table, ' WHERE batch_id = ''', pipeline().parameters.batch_id, ''' AND id BETWEEN ', string(item().min_id), ' AND ', string(item().max_id))

body.value: @json(concat('{"event":"pipeline_complete","pipeline_name":"', pipeline().Pipeline, '","run_id":"', pipeline().RunId, '","batch_id":"', pipeline().parameters.batch_id, '","env":"', pipeline().parameters.env, '","row_count":', variables('row_count'), ',"processing_flag":"', variables('processing_flag'), '","dest_table":"', pipeline().parameters.dest_table, '","timestamp":"', utcNow(), '"}'))

pipelines.description: LLM pipeline: end_to_end_chain_all_activity_types (Full end-to-end pipeline using all seven activity types with output chaining at every step and three levels of nesting in IfCondition/ForEach)

@concat('SELECT * FROM ', pipeline().parameters.source_table, ' WHERE batch_id = ''', pipeline().parameters.batch_id, ''' AND id BETWEEN ', string(item().min_id), ' AND ', string(item().max_id))
